metadata.name: Update an Employee Record in HRIS

description: An HR admin needs to update an employee's job title in the HRIS following a promotion.

nodes.task_description: Identify the employee in the HRIS.

expected_outcome.value: Admin successfully locates the correct employee record.

nodes.task_description: Update the 'Job Title' field from 'Analyst' to 'Senior Analyst'.

expected_outcome.value: Admin correctly changes the job title.

nodes.task_description: Save the changes and verify that the new title is reflected in the employee's profile.

expected_outcome.value: Admin saves the record and confirms the update was successful.
